india_trends.title: Air India delays salary hikes, pushes cost cuts amid volatile FY26 outlook
india_trends.summary: Air India is tightening its belt. Facing global challenges, the airline is cutting costs. This move comes after significant expansion. Management aims to save money without harming service improvements. Salary raises are delayed. The airline is optimising routes and improving on-time performance.

india_trends.title: Britannia bets on ‘Many Indias’ strategy amid inflation, shifting consumer demand
india_trends.summary: Britannia is adopting a 'Many Indias' strategy. Startup-style teams will gain local decision-making power. india_trends.title: Hyundai India plans ₹7,500-cr capex for FY27 as Q4 net falls
india_trends.summary: Hyundai India is investing ₹7,500 crore and launching two new models this fiscal year to capitalize on rising demand. india_trends.title: Manufacturing retains growth pace in Q4 despite cost pressures: Ficci
india_trends.summary: India's manufacturing sector saw positive growth in Q4 FY26, driven by robust domestic demand. india_trends.title: States told to shift to new base year for GSDP by end of FY27
india_trends.summary: The statistics ministry has directed states to adopt 2022-23 as the new base year for Gross State Domestic Product (GSDP) computation by fiscal 2027. This move aligns state-level estimates with the revised national GDP framework, enhancing regional economic data accuracy. While states are also free

india_trends.title: Oil PSUs suffer ₹30,000 cr under-recoveries a month
india_trends.summary: Indian oil companies face significant monthly losses on petrol, diesel, and LPG. This is due to selling fuels below international rates, which have risen sharply. india_trends.title: India orders antitrust probe into liquor giant Pernod's dealing with retailers
india_trends.summary: India's competition watchdog has launched a probe into French liquor giant Pernod Ricard. Allegations suggest exclusive deals with retailers in New Delhi aimed to boost its brands. india_trends.title: US market today: Strong US jobs data complicates any Kevin Warsh push for lower rates
india_trends.summary: Strong U.S. hiring data in April has diminished the likelihood of Federal Reserve interest rate cuts this year, bolstering the stance of officials concerned about rising inflation. The robust job market, coupled with surging energy prices, suggests the Fed may need to maintain current rates for an e

india_trends.title: Jane Street rakes in record first-quarter trading haul of $16.1 billion, sources say
india_trends.summary: Jane Street achieved a record $16.1 billion in trading revenue for the first quarter, driven by market volatility and gains in AI company stakes. The firm more than doubled profits to $10.3 billion, solidifying its lead in high-frequency trading. Medium-frequency strategies and investments in AI fir

india_trends.title: Drug regulator cracks down on delayed safety reporting by pharma companies
india_trends.summary: India's drug regulator CDSCO has issued new rules for drug safety reporting. Companies must now submit safety reports from the actual launch date of new drugs, not from when they were approved. This change aims to capture real-world safety data more effectively. Additionally, all forms and uses of a

india_trends.title: Fuel price hike on the cards as India struggles to absorb soaring crude costs
india_trends.summary: India is grappling with significant economic challenges due to elevated global fuel prices. The government has absorbed substantial daily losses to shield consumers. However, the ongoing West Asia crisis and disruptions to energy supply routes are making this unsustainable. Tough decisions loom rega

india_trends.title: EQT emerges sole bidder for OmniActive Health Technologies
india_trends.summary: Swedish investment powerhouse EQT is now leading the charge as the exclusive bidder for OmniActive Health Technologies, following the rejection of a competing offer from Temasek and Novo Holdings. Known for its robust presence in the nutraceutical industry, OmniActive is under the umbrella of TA Ass

india_trends.title: Oman ports provide lifeline to Indian exporters, GCC nations
india_trends.summary: Oman's strategically located Indian Ocean ports are facilitating vital food exports from India to six GCC nations, circumventing disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz. Sohar and Salalah ports, equipped with specialized agricultural terminals and advanced infrastructure, are ensuring a steady supply of

india_trends.title: Nvidia stock hits fresh record high as rally extends to third day, on track for biggest weekly gain in 6 months
india_trends.summary: Nvidia's shares rose 3% to a record high of $217.80, marking its largest weekly gain since October. The surge follows a partnership with IREN to enhance AI infrastructure, involving a $2.1 billion investment and a five-year cloud services agreement worth $3.4 billion.

india_trends.title: Gold, silver rates today: Comex gold jumps $50/oz, silver rallies $2 as traders track US-Iran talks
india_trends.summary: Precious metals continued their upward trend, driven by optimism over a US-Iran peace deal and a weaker dollar. Gold rose $50 to $4,760, while silver surged to $82.16. A strong US jobs report indicated economic resilience, although concerns over inflation persist.

india_trends.title: PMJJBY disbursed Rs 17,600 crore to families since launch in 2015: LIC
india_trends.summary: The Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana is vital for the government's 'Insurance for All by 2047' goal. Launched in 2015, it offers life cover of Rs 2 lakh for an annual premium of Rs 436. The scheme has enrolled over 27 crore individuals and disbursed Rs 17,600 crore in claims.

india_trends.title: Labour Ministry notifies final rules for the Wage Code & Industrial Relations Code
india_trends.summary: With Friday’s notification, the government has paved the way for the fixing of floor wages in India under the Code on Wages and setting up a reskilling fund for workers under the Industrial Relations Code along with the appointment of conciliation, certifying officer and appellate authority.

india_trends.title: India seeks early resolution of issues related to implementation of EFTA trade pact
india_trends.summary: In a bid to overcome obstacles in the trade pact with the EFTA bloc, India is pushing for quick resolutions. india_trends.title: Biosimilar ramp-up to drive growth for Biocon in FY27
india_trends.summary: Recently launched biosimilars across markets have begun scaling up and will gather momentum through the year, particularly in the second half of FY27, the company's top executive said
